headline: OpenAI Worries Spark Tech Stocks Selloff
summary: Tech looked set to go from leader to laggard on Tuesday as investors fretted about OpenAI's user and revenue growth. The ChatGPT developer missed its own targets, causing executives to worry about whether it will be able to meet its spending commitments, The Wall Street Journal reported, citing people familiar with the matter.

content.title: OpenAI Worries Spark Tech Stocks Selloff
content.summary: Tech looked set to go from leader to laggard on Tuesday as investors fretted about OpenAI's user and revenue growth. The ChatGPT developer missed its own targets, causing executives to worry about whether it will be able to meet its spending commitments, The Wall Street Journal reported, citing people familiar with the matter.
